TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kanaluk, title = Kanaluk, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kanaluk} }

S.FORM: Kanaluk Itiniay i Haiduan Cen no Taitung ko Kanaluk a niyaro', 50 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 232 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 229 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 88%, Amis 5%, Paiwan 3%, roma 3%.
S.PHON: kana…ĺo~u~uk itiniaj i ńßai…¨~…ģo~u~uan ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u kana…ĺo~u~uk a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Kanaluk Itiniay i Haiduan Cen no Taitung ko Kanaluk a niyaro', 50 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 232 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 229 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 88%, Amis 5%, Paiwan 3%, roma 3%.
S.PHON: kana…ĺo~u~uk itiniaj i ńßai…¨~…ģo~u~uan ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u kana…ĺo~u~uk a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%.
